prompt: To read books
correctAnswer: para leer libros

prompt: To go hiking
correctAnswer: para ir de excursión

prompt: To play chess
correctAnswer: para jugar ajedrez

prompt: Say: I like to paint in my free time.
correctAnswer: Me gusta pintar en mi tiempo libre.
hints: Use 'I like to' to express enjoyment.

prompt: Say: My hobby is cooking.
correctAnswer: Mi hobby está cocinando.
hints: State your hobby with 'my hobby is'.

prompt: Ask: Do you have any hobbies?
correctAnswer: ¿Tienes hobbies?

prompt: Vocabulary: a sport played in water
correctAnswer: natación
hints: You move through water with your arms and legs.

prompt: Say: I love listening to music.
correctAnswer: Me encanta escuchar música.

prompt: Say: I play football with my friends.
correctAnswer: Juego fútbol con mis amigos.
hints: State an activity and who you do it with.

prompt: Ask: What do you like to do at weekends?
correctAnswer: ¿Qué te gusta hacer los fines de semana?
hints: A friendly question about free time.

prompt: Say: I like painting on weekends.
correctAnswer: Me gusta pintar los fines de semana.

prompt: Say: I play chess with my friend.
correctAnswer: Yo juego ajedrez con mi amigo.

prompt: Ask: Do you enjoy reading comics?
correctAnswer: ¿Te gusta leer cómics?

prompt: Say: I play tennis on Saturday mornings.
correctAnswer: Toco tenis los sábados por la mañana.

prompt: Say: I watch movies at home.
correctAnswer: Veo películas en casa.

prompt: Say: I swim at the pool.
correctAnswer: Nadaré en la piscina.

prompt: Say: I have been learning the guitar for six months.
correctAnswer: He estado aprendiendo la guitarra durante seis meses.
hints: Present perfect continuous for an ongoing activity.

prompt: Ask: How often do you go cycling?
correctAnswer: ¿Con qué frecuencia vas a ciclismo?
hints: Use 'how often do you' to ask about frequency.

prompt: Say: I joined a book club last year.
correctAnswer: Me uní a un club de libros el año pasado.
hints: Simple past for a completed action.

prompt: Say: My favorite hobby is photography.
correctAnswer: Mi hobby favorito es la fotografía.

prompt: Ask: Have you ever tried rock climbing?
correctAnswer: ¿Alguna vez has intentado escalar roca?
hints: 'Have you ever tried' asks about life experience.

prompt: Say: I enjoy baking at the weekends.
correctAnswer: Me gusta hornear los fines de semana.

prompt: Say: I started jogging to keep fit.
correctAnswer: Empecé a correr para seguir en forma.

prompt: Say: I started learning photography last year.
correctAnswer: Empecé a aprender fotografía el año pasado.
hints: Past simple for finished past actions.

prompt: Say: I usually relax by listening to music.
correctAnswer: Normalmente me relajo escuchando música.

prompt: Ask: Which hobby helps you reduce stress?
correctAnswer: ¿Qué pasatiempo le ayuda a reducir el estrés?

prompt: Choose the best response. What do you like to do after work?
correctAnswer: Normalmente pinto o voy a correr.

prompt: Choose the best response. What do you do on weekends?
correctAnswer: Conozco amigos y juego.

prompt: Choose the best response. Do you like sports?
correctAnswer: Sí, a veces juego fútbol.

prompt: Say: I find that gardening is a good way to unwind after a stressful day.
correctAnswer: Encuentro que la jardinería es una buena manera de relajarse después de un día estresante.
hints: 'I find that' introduces a personal observation; 'unwind' means relax.

prompt: Say: I have recently taken up pottery and find it very therapeutic.
correctAnswer: Recientemente he tomado cerámica y lo he encontrado muy terapéutico.
hints: 'Taken up' means started a new hobby; 'therapeutic' means calming and healing.

prompt: Ask: What do you do to switch off when you are feeling overwhelmed?
correctAnswer: ¿Qué haces para apagarte cuando te sientes abrumado?
hints: 'Switch off' means mentally disconnect from stress.

prompt: Say: Although I am not very competitive, I enjoy the social side of team sports.
correctAnswer: Aunque no soy muy competitivo, disfruto del lado social de los deportes de equipo.

prompt: Say: I have been meaning to get into yoga for years but never quite managed it.
correctAnswer: He querido entrar en yoga durante años pero nunca lo he conseguido.
hints: 'Been meaning to' = intended to but not done; 'get into' = start doing regularly.

prompt: Say: Traveling is not just a hobby for me — it is a way of expanding my perspective.
correctAnswer: Viajar no es sólo un pasatiempo para mí, es una manera de ampliar mi perspectiva.
hints: 'Not just... but' contrasts a simple description with a deeper meaning.

prompt: Say: I have been training for a half-marathon and find it both challenging and rewarding.
correctAnswer: He estado entrenando por medio maratón y lo encuentro desafiante y gratificante.

prompt: Say: I joined a local book club to meet new people.
correctAnswer: Me uní a un club local para conocer gente nueva.

prompt: Say: My main hobby changed after I moved to the city.
correctAnswer: Mi hobby principal cambió después de mudarme a la ciudad.

prompt: Ask: How do you stay motivated when practicing your hobby?
correctAnswer: ¿Cómo te mantienes motivado cuando practicas tu pasatiempo?

prompt: Say: I relax by reading books.
correctAnswer: Me relajo leyendo libros.

prompt: Say: I practice guitar every day.
correctAnswer: Practico guitarra todos los días.

prompt: Say: I enjoy painting in my free time.
correctAnswer: Me gusta pintar en mi tiempo libre.

prompt: Say: Leisure time has become an increasingly contested concept in the age of constant connectivity.
correctAnswer: El tiempo de ocio se ha convertido en un concepto cada vez más cuestionado en la era de la conectividad constante.
hints: 'Contested concept' means something whose meaning is debated; 'connectivity' = being always online.

prompt: Say: I have always been drawn to solitary pursuits, which is perhaps why I gravitated towards writing.
correctAnswer: Siempre he sido atraído a persecuciones solitarias, que es quizás por lo que he gravitado hacia la escritura.
hints: 'Drawn to' means attracted to; 'gravitated towards' means naturally moved towards.

prompt: Ask: Do you think hobbies say something fundamental about a person's character?
correctAnswer: ¿Crees que los hobbies dicen algo fundamental sobre el carácter de una persona?
hints: 'Fundamental' means basic or essential; invite a nuanced discussion.

prompt: Say: Amateur astronomy demands patience, precision, and a willingness to accept that most nights will yield nothing spectacular.
correctAnswer: La astronomía amateur exige paciencia, precisión y voluntad de aceptar que la mayoría de las noches no dará nada espectacular.
culturalNote: Amateur astronomers have made significant contributions to science, including the discovery of new comets and variable stars.

prompt: Say: The distinction between a hobby and a passion lies in the degree to which it defines your sense of self.
correctAnswer: La distinción entre un hobby y una pasión reside en el grado en que define su sentido de sí mismo.
hints: 'Lies in' means is found in or depends on; 'sense of self' is your identity.

prompt: Say: Leisure activities improve my focus and creativity.
correctAnswer: Las actividades de ocio mejoran mi enfoque y creatividad.
hints: Abstract nouns are common at B2.

prompt: Say: I prefer hobbies that combine social interaction with skill-building.
correctAnswer: Prefiero pasatiempos que combinan la interacción social con el desarrollo de habilidades.

prompt: Ask: To what extent should hobbies be goal-oriented?
correctAnswer: ¿En qué medida deben orientarse los hobbies hacia objetivos?
